subcodes.first_line: O 'Ali! Shouldst thou render thanksgiving unto the True One, exalted be His glory, with the tongue of all the world, it would verily prove insufficient in His grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اگر بالسن عالم حق جل جلاله را شکر نمائی هرآینه قلیل بوده و خواهد بود در فضل
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
